metadata.description: wiregraph — cross-compartment call graph in an embedded SQLite file (no daemon), exposed to Claude as MCP tools.

plugins.name: wiregraph
plugins.description: Index a project into a cross-compartment call graph (embedded SQLite, no daemon or JVM) exposed as MCP tools, so Claude navigates/audits/refactors code reading ~half the file bytes grep+Read would. Project-scoped, balanced auto-update, self-refresh via update_graph. /wiregraph-init to start.
